ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "pages" TEXT /* Pages of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the publication */,
  "formatted" TEXT /* Formatted string for the publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords related to the publication */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of citations for the publication */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of downloads for the publication */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views for the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the author */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the author */,
  "qualification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author's qualification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journals" (
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the journal */,
  "issn" TEXT /* International Standard Serial Number (ISSN) of the journal */,
  "eissn" TEXT /* Electronic International Standard Serial Number (eISSN) of the journal */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the journal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the publication type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the publication type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_authors" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "author_order" INTEGER /* Order of the author in the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id", "author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_journals" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the journal */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the journal */,
  "issue" INTEGER /* Issue of the journal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id", "journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_types_publications" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication type */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id", "pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "qualification" (
  "qualification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each qualification */,
  "qualification_name" TEXT /* Name of the qualification */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the qualification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qualification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., author, editor, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_parent" (
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parent publication */,
  "parent_title" TEXT /* Title of the parent publication */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_parent_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes made in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)
column_names: Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication
Number of citations for the publication
Number of downloads for the publication
Number of views for the publication
International Standard Serial Number (ISSN) of the journal
Electronic International Standard Serial Number (eISSN) of the journal
Unique identifier for each publication type
Order of the author in the publication
Role of the user (e.g., author, editor, admin)
Date of the user's last login
Unique identifier for each access log
Unique identifier for each parent publication
ID of the user who made the review
